batch_6_note_strategy.strategy_description: Reference a specific recent post, headline quirk, or genuine niche interest. Avoids AI-slop pattern. Must feel human and slightly personal — not generic praise. One authentic observation + low-key reason to connect.
note_types_priority: post_reference — reference a specific post from last 60 days (best engagement)
headline — reference something specific/unusual in their profile headline
interest — reference a genuine shared professional interest
generic — fallback: sector + location warm intro, no pitch
hard_constraints: No mention of email campaign or prior outreach
No pitch in connection note — relationship first
No question marks — declarative or statement-based
Confirm IMAP per lead before sending connection request
batch_6_note_strategy.note_template_example: Hi [Name] — your post about [specific topic] caught my eye. Rare to see a [sector] owner thinking that way. Good to connect.
